mapper.sql: id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, owner_uid, res_id, res_inst_id, res_desc, res_path, level_one, level_two, level_three, level_four, start_time, end_time, kind_type, res_auth_label
id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, owner_uid, res_id, res_inst_id, res_desc, res_path, level_one, level_two, level_three, level_four, start_time, end_time, kind_type
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM dm_auth_res WHERE owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and res_id = #{resId} and kind_type = #{authKind,javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.sdk.security.auth.AuthKind} and res_path like concat(#{path},'%')

SELECT
FROM dm_auth_res WHERE owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and res_id = #{resId} and kind_type = #{authKind,javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.sdk.security.auth.AuthKind} and res_path = #{path}

SELECT
FROM dm_auth_res WHERE owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and kind_type = #{authKind,javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.sdk.security.auth.AuthKind}

SELECT
FROM dm_auth_res WHERE owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and kind_type = #{authKind,javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.sdk.security.auth.AuthKind} and res_id = 0 and res_path = '/' and (start_time is null or start_time < now()) and (end_time is null or end_time > now())

SELECT u.id, u.gmt_create, u.gmt_modified, u.uid, u.email, u.username, u.phone, u.account, u.password, u.op_password, u.role_id, u.access_key, u.secret_key, u.last_try_login_time, u.login_fail_count, u.login_locked, u.last_try_op_verify_time, u.op_verify_fail_count, u.op_locked, u.account_type, u.bind_type, u.bind_account, u.allow_local, u.disable, u.parent_id, u.user_status, u.contact_me, u.src, u.keyword, u.client_id, u.country, u.maintainer, u.last_date_update_pwd, u.union_id, u.sso_type, u.customer_id, u.saas_user_status, u.access_token, u.marketplace_type, u.use_mfa FROM dm_auth_user u JOIN dm_auth_res r ON u.uid = r.owner_uid WHERE r.kind_type = #{authKind,javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.sdk.security.auth.AuthKind} and r.res_id = 0 and r.res_path = '/' and (r.start_time is null or r.start_time < now()) and (r.end_time is null or r.end_time > now()) and u.parent_id = ( SELECT p.id FROM dm_auth_user p WHERE p.uid = #{puid} )

SELECT
FROM dm_auth_res WHERE owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and kind_type = #{authKind,javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.sdk.security.auth.AuthKind}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM dm_auth_res WHERE res_path like concat(#{prefixPath}, '%') and kind_type = #{kindType}
DELETE FROM dm_auth_res WHERE end_time is not null and end_time <= #{endTime}
delete FROM dm_auth_res WHERE owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and res_id = #{resId} and kind_type = #{authKind,javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.sdk.security.auth.AuthKind} and res_path = #{path}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM dm_auth_res WHERE res_id = #{resId} and owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and res_path = #{resPath} and kind_type = #{authKind,javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.sdk.security.auth.AuthKind}
